description: Main learning videos for applying multiplication and combined operations to real-life museum problems including word problems with transport

videos.title: Multiplication in Real Life | Times Tables at the Museum
videos.description: See how multiplication helps in real life! If each bus carries 10 children and there are 3 buses, how many children are there? Solve fun museum problems!
learningObjectives: Apply multiplication to solve real-life museum problems
Calculate totals for groups of people or items
Use times tables in practical transport contexts

questions.question: Each auto-rickshaw can carry 3 passengers. How many passengers can 5 auto-rickshaws carry?

videos.title: Word problems to solve - estimation and adding up - 4th grade math
videos.description: Practice solving word problems using estimation and addition! Work through real-life problems step by step, choosing the right operation and checking answers. Perfect for applying all Transport Museum math skills.
learningObjectives: Solve multi-step word problems involving transport museum scenarios
Choose the correct operation (addition, subtraction, multiplication) for each problem
Apply estimation to check if answers are reasonable

questions.question: A family pays 120 rupees for museum tickets and 80 rupees for snacks. They started with 300 rupees. How much money is left?

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness
